title: 'eviyl #0191
definition:
1) be foolish, foolish
    1a) (subst)
        1a1) of one who despises wisdom
        1a2) of one who mocks when guilty
        1a3) of one who is quarrelsome
        1a4) of one who is licentious
nasbUsage:
